subcodes.first_line: O my God! This is Thy handmaiden who hath migrated in Thy path and hath turned toward the Dawning-Place of Thy Cause and the Source of Thy Revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی هذه امتک التی هاجرت فی سبیلک و ارادت شطر مطلع امرک و مصدر وحیک الی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
